rootCause: src/game-player-ui.js wrote textContent to #mastery-goal during updateHud(), but index.html omitted that required element.
fixes: Guarded mastery-goal text updates when the node is unavailable.
Added a startup DOM-contract test for every required player selector.
Added a focused mastery-goal regression test.
browserExecutionNote: The sandbox blocked the focused local browser probe with net::ERR_BLOCKED_BY_ADMINISTRATOR. GitHub-hosted browser execution remains required.
